title: Competitive Analysis Framework
content: A comprehensive competitive analysis includes: 1) Identifying direct and indirect competitors; 2) Analyzing competitor products/services and pricing; 3) Evaluating competitor marketing strategies; 4) Assessing competitor strengths and weaknesses; 5) Benchmarking against industry standards. Tools: SWOT analysis, Porter's Five Forces, and market share tracking. Regular monitoring helps identify market trends and opportunities.
content_zh: 全面的竞品分析包括：1) 识别直接和间接竞争对手；2) 分析竞争对手的产品/服务和定价；3) 评估竞争对手的营销策略；4) 评估竞争对手的优势和劣势；5) 对标行业标准。工具：SWOT分析、波特五力模型和市场份额跟踪。定期监控有助于识别市场趋势和机会。
